description: Initial Palantir Foundry domain pack for Knowledge OS validation.

nodeTypes.name: ArchitectureLayer
nodeTypes.description: A Foundry architecture layer such as Infrastructure, Data, Semantic, AI, or Application.

nodeTypes.name: OntologyObject
nodeTypes.description: A modeled object type in the Foundry ontology.

nodeTypes.name: OntologyLink
nodeTypes.description: A relationship between ontology object types.

nodeTypes.name: OntologyAction
nodeTypes.description: An action exposed through the ontology for operational workflows.

nodeTypes.name: AdministrativeAction
nodeTypes.description: An administrative operation for configuration, governance, or platform management.

edgeTypes.name: BELONGS_TO_LAYER
edgeTypes.description: A Foundry component or concept belongs to an architecture layer.

edgeTypes.name: POWERS
edgeTypes.description: A Foundry component powers a capability, workflow, or application.

edgeTypes.name: AUTHENTICATED_BY
edgeTypes.description: A workflow, component, or action is authenticated by a security boundary.

seedEntities.name: Foundry
seedEntities.summary: The core platform being modeled by the initial Knowledge OS corpus.

seedEntities.name: Apollo
seedEntities.summary: Foundry continuous delivery and deployment capability.

seedEntities.name: Rubix
seedEntities.summary: Foundry component referenced by the initial domain pack.

seedEntities.name: Ontology
seedEntities.summary: Semantic modeling system that provides operational context.

seedEntities.name: AIP
seedEntities.summary: AI platform capabilities grounded by Foundry knowledge and ontology context.

seedEntities.name: Multimodal Data Plane
seedEntities.summary: Data plane capability referenced by the initial Foundry architecture.

seedEntities.name: Decision Support
seedEntities.summary: Capability for supporting decisions with context and evidence.

seedEntities.name: Governance Controls
seedEntities.summary: Controls that support governance across Foundry assets.

seedEntities.name: Data Governance
seedEntities.summary: Governance controls over data assets and usage.

validationRules: Every extracted Foundry node must map to a base or domain-pack node type.
Every extracted edge must map to a base or domain-pack edge type.
Security and governance facts must preserve source evidence.
Domain pack aliases may not create a new canonical entity when a seed entity exists.
